author: suctl
description: Manages Odoo modules, databases, and users. Uses the service-attached pattern: pre-activate installs suctl-odoo-service into Odoo's systemd unit via ExecStartPost.

capabilities.name: odoo.module.list
capabilities.description: List installed and available Odoo modules.

capabilities.name: odoo.module.install
capabilities.description: Install an Odoo module by technical name.

capabilities.name: odoo.module.upgrade
capabilities.description: Upgrade a specific Odoo module.

capabilities.name: odoo.module.upgrade-all
capabilities.description: Upgrade all installed Odoo modules in a database. When invoked from the module survey action bar, receives {scope, subjects[]} and upgrades all installed modules in the database regardless of the visible subject set.

params.name: subjects
params.description: Visible subject ids (ignored — all installed modules are upgraded)

capabilities.name: odoo.module.upgrade-selected
capabilities.description: Upgrade the specified subset of Odoo modules in a database. Invoked from the module survey action bar; receives {scope, subjects[]} where subjects are the currently visible composite 'db/module' ids (e.g. after activating the upgradable facet).

params.name: scope
params.description: Database name (injected by core from the survey scope)

params.name: subjects
params.description: Composite 'db/module' ids of the modules to upgrade

capabilities.name: odoo.module.uninstall
capabilities.description: Uninstall an Odoo module by technical name.

capabilities.name: odoo.module.detect-changes
capabilities.description: Detect and apply file-level module changes (i18n, views, data).

capabilities.name: odoo.module.force-update-data
capabilities.description: Force reload of all data XML/CSV files for a module.

capabilities.name: odoo.database.survey
capabilities.description: Render the database landscape survey (list of all Odoo databases on this instance).

capabilities.name: odoo.database.focus
capabilities.description: Render the focus view for a selected Odoo database (module and user counts).

capabilities.name: odoo.database.overview
capabilities.description: Whole-column data source for the database survey: returns the modules (installed/total), users (active/total) and upgrade-drift status as a row-keyed column-map for every database in one call. Host-wide — one server.verdict gives the drift for all databases (fingerprint matrix computed once); module/user counts are read per database. Async — fills the three survey columns of every row progressively.

capabilities.name: odoo.module.survey
capabilities.description: Render the module landscape survey for a database (all modules with status and version, each tagged with applicable facets).

params.name: scope
params.description: Database name (injected by core from the selected database row)

capabilities.name: odoo.module.focus
capabilities.description: Render the focus view for a selected Odoo module. Subject is a composite 'db/module' id.

capabilities.name: odoo.user.survey
capabilities.description: Render the user landscape survey for a database (all internal users with login and status, each tagged with applicable facets).

params.name: scope
params.description: Database name (injected by core from the selected database row)

capabilities.name: odoo.user.focus
capabilities.description: Render the focus view for a selected Odoo user. Subject is a composite 'db/login' id.

capabilities.name: odoo.db.list
capabilities.description: List all Odoo databases on this instance.

capabilities.name: odoo.db.create
capabilities.description: Create a new Odoo database.

capabilities.name: odoo.db.duplicate
capabilities.description: Duplicate an existing Odoo database.

capabilities.name: odoo.user.list
capabilities.description: List Odoo users.

capabilities.name: odoo.user.reset-password
capabilities.description: Set a new password for an Odoo user directly via the ORM. Bypasses email-based reset — intended for operator recovery scenarios.

capabilities.name: odoo.user.activate
capabilities.description: Activate (unarchive) an Odoo user account.

capabilities.name: odoo.user.deactivate
capabilities.description: Deactivate (archive) an Odoo user account.

capabilities.name: odoo.server.survey
capabilities.description: Render the server card: a single 'server' subject showing Odoo service reachability and loaded-code restart state. The host-wide upgrade-drift breakdown is deferred to focus.

capabilities.name: odoo.server.focus
capabilities.description: Render the server detail card: service status, loaded-code (restart) anchor, and the host-wide upgrade-drift breakdown (computed on drill).

capabilities.name: odoo.server.upgrade-drifted
capabilities.description: Upgrade every installed module whose on-disk content drifted from its database stamp, across all databases (server survey 'auto upgrade' action). Surface-triggered: requires the visible 'subjects' set; an empty invoke is rejected with INVALID_PARAMS and performs no work.

params.name: scope
params.description: Unused — the action is host-wide (injected empty by core for top-level surfaces)

params.name: subjects
params.description: Visible server-survey subject ids; gates execution (proof of a real surface trigger). The upgrade itself is host-wide.

capabilities.name: odoo.server.restart-service
capabilities.description: Restart the Odoo service to re-anchor loaded code (clears needs-restart). Host-wide; runs from the suctl side via systemctl. Surface-triggered: requires the visible 'subjects' set; an empty invoke is rejected with INVALID_PARAMS and performs no restart.

params.name: subjects
params.description: Visible server-survey subject ids; gates execution (proof of a real surface trigger). The restart is host-wide.
